title: Applied Spectrometry
description: Move Ink with AE2. Because fuck balance.
body:
An AE2/Spectrum addon that gives AE2 the ability to store and transfer Ink.  
Storage/Import/Export buses work exactly as expected for Ink, and Portable Ink Storage Cells can be used like normal ink-holding items.  
Note that AE2-initiated Ink transfer does not respect normal Ink mechanics and directly pushes or pulls Ink.
